input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.4.2.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.4.2.7
            TITLE: each apps must be able to be checked during technical inspection by having one of the two:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.4.2.7: Each APPS must be able to be checked during Technical Inspection by having one of the two:
T.4.2.7 Each APPS must be able to be checked during Technical Inspection by having one of the two: 
• A separate detachable connector that enables a check of functions by unplugging it  
• An inline switchable breakout box available that allows disconnection of each APPS 
signal.

final_answer: T.4.2.7: Each APPS must be able to be checked during Technical Inspection by having one of the two: • A separate detachable connector that enables a check of functions by unplugging it • An inline switchable breakout box available that allows disconnection of each APPS signal.
